ogTitle: St Kilda West vs St Leonards: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in St Kilda West and St Leonards.
heading: St Kilda West vs St Leonards — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Kilda West, Victoria and St Leonards, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St Kilda West has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to St Leonards (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Kilda West or St Leonards safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Kilda West has a flood risk score of 48/100, while St Leonards scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Kilda West scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. St Leonards scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Kilda West or St Leonards?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St Kilda West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
